name: Conveyor
description: Conveyor — Security review automation platform for completing vendor security questionnaires and sharing trust documentation.

seo.title: Conveyor — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Conveyor: Conveyor — Security review automation platform for completing vendor security questionnaires and sharing trust documentation.

when_to_use: Automated security questionnaire completion for sales pipeline
Trust center hosting for prospect security review self-service
Vendor security profile sharing with enterprise customers
SOC 2 report and pen test distribution workflow
Security review SLA tracking for deal acceleration

pros: AI auto-answers security questionnaires from your trust center
Shared trust page cuts inbound questionnaire volume
Reduces weeks of sales-engineering work to hours
Integrates with Slack and Salesforce for request routing
cons: AI answers still need human review for accuracy
Pricing scales with questionnaire volume, not seats
Limited value if prospects insist on custom forms
Evidence freshness depends on your own upkeep
review.verdict: A pragmatic way to kill questionnaire toil, though AI outputs still need a human check before sending.
review.best_for: B2B SaaS security teams drowning in sales-cycle security questionnaires.
review.not_for: Pre-revenue startups with few prospects or teams without existing compliance evidence.
